issues.title: 熔斷解除條件仍是唯一即時部署阻塞點
issues.action: 先把即時部署阻塞語義切回熔斷解除條件；在熔斷未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主阻塞。 最近 50 筆需至少 15 勝，當前 14 勝，還差 1 勝；同時連續虧損必須 < 50。
issues.next_action: 先把即時部署阻塞語義切回熔斷解除條件；在熔斷未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主阻塞。 最近 50 筆需至少 15 勝，當前 14 勝，還差 1 勝；同時連續虧損必須 < 50。

summary.api_trade_guardrail_context: 買入 / 加倉會在 ExecutionService.submit_order 前先檢查即時部署阻塞點

issues.title: 建立 high-conviction top-k OOS ROI gate，讓 APP 從研究轉實戰
issues.action: 依照六色帽會議與量化研究交叉分析，優先建立 walk-forward OOS top-k matrix；只讓通過 ROI、勝率、max drawdown、profit factor、worst fold、minimum trades 與 current-live support 的候選進入 deployment profile。未通過前維持 paper/shadow/hold-only。
issues.next_action: 依照六色帽會議與量化研究交叉分析，優先建立 walk-forward OOS top-k matrix；只讓通過 ROI、勝率、max drawdown、profit factor、worst fold、minimum trades 與 current-live support 的候選進入 deployment profile。未通過前維持 paper/shadow/hold-only。

summary.strategy_lab_contract: leaderboard must surface OOS ROI, win_rate, profit_factor, max_drawdown, worst_fold, trade_count, top_k_precision, support_route, deployable verdict, and allow click-to-edit saved strategies
summary.execution_contract: current-live blocker / unsupported support route keeps buy/add exposure fail-closed; reduce/sell diagnostics remain available

verify: Strategy Lab leaderboard shows top-k OOS ROI/win-rate/DD/trades/deployable verdict

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6507, cv_std=0.1006, cv_worst=0.5501)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。
issues.next_action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。

issues.title: support-aware core_plus_macro_plus_all_4h patch must stay visible but reference-only outside current live scope
issues.action: Keep the same recommended_patch summary across /api/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and docs; the patch describes a spillover/broader lane rather than the current live scope, so do not promote it to a deployable runtime patch even though exact support is available.
